questions.question: Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Feud
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word. Butterfly was <u>attracted</u> towards the bright flowers.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word. He was <u>admired</u> for introducing welfare programmes.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Stern
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Empathetic
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Wisdom
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the word given in brackets to fill in the blank. The doctor said that the patient named Rumi is in the ____________________(initial) stage of lung cancer.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Ecstasy
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Guilty
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Forthcoming
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Break
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Crude
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Humility
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Humane
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the word given in brackets to fill in the blank. The company is looking for some ______________(idle) workers who can join the organisation immediately.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word. His <u>amazing</u> performance made him famous.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Annoy
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Enormous

Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the word given in brackets to fill in the blank. The student provided her English teacher a short and _________(incoherent) account of her journey to Shimla with her parents.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Periodic

Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Harmony
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Demolish
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word. They waited with <u>anxiety</u> for the final results.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the word given in brackets to fill in the blank. A _________________(distinct) sense of restlessness was bothering me when I left the cemetery.
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Often
Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word. Divergent

Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word. Addiction of drugs proved <u>detrimental</u> for his health.
